[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10011100 4
1 11101110 6
2 10001110 4
3 10111000 4
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 10110001 4
